TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_bzngah, title = bzngah, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/bzngah} }

S.FORM: bzngah yasa qu pkaki' kya babaw kayal ka ttaypuq balay ru pyax, pyax smyax ktan. pnawngan pintkaykay' na nbkis sraral hya' qu bzngah qani hya' ga ramu' na wagi' ka wal bun na squliq maha ma. yalaw gi minsazing qu wagi' mru mkilux iayl qu kayal lmru, stu' naha' sa sazing mrkyas mlikuy musa' smbu' lma, nanu' bun naha' qu wagi' lga mprpus tay babaw kayal qu ramu' niya' lru yasa qu nyux ta' ktan ka bzngah qani la.

bzngah yasa qu pkaki' kya babaw kayal ka ttaypuq balay ru pyax, pyax smyax ktan. pnawngan pintkaykay' na nbkis sraral hya' qu bzngah qani hya' ga ramu' na wagi' ka wal bun na squliq maha ma. yalaw gi minsazing qu wagi' mru mkilux iayl qu kayal lmru, stu' naha' sa sazing mrkyas mlikuy musa' smbu' lma, nanu' bun naha' qu wagi' lga mprpus tay babaw kayal qu ramu' niya' lru yasa qu nyux ta' ktan ka bzngah qani la.
S.PHON: βzŋaħ jas~ɕa qu pkakiʔ kja βaβaw kajal ka ttajpuq βalaj ru pjax, pjax s~ɕmjax ktan. pnawŋan pintkajkajʔ na nβkis~ɕ s~ɕraral ħjaʔ qu βzŋaħ qani ħjaʔ ɣa ramuʔ na waɣiʔ ka wal βun na s~ɕquliq maħa ma. jalaw ɣi mins~ɕaziŋ qu waɣiʔ mru mkilux iajl qu kajal lmru, s~ɕtuʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa s~ɕaziŋ mrkjas~ɕ mlikuj mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕmβuʔ lma, nanuʔ βun naħaʔ qu waɣiʔ lɣa mprpus~ɕ taj βaβaw kajal qu ramuʔ nijaʔ lru jas~ɕa qu njux taʔ ktan ka βzŋaħ qani la.
